title: NFFC Enhancement Pack
description: This modpack was made for the No Friends Friends Club Minecraft server.
body:
## About
The NFFC Enhancement Pack is an optional but highly recommended collection of client-side mods that aim to enhance social interactions and improve performance on the No Friends Friends Club Minecraft server. Players are free to modify the pack as needed; however, it is not recommended to remove Simple Voice Chat or Vivecraft!

## Features

### Proximity Voice Chat
The [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat) mod introduces voice chat to the game, allowing communication with nearby players without having to worry about a crowded Discord channel. Players must be within 64 blocks to hear each other. Private group chats can be created through the in-game menu (default key: `V`).
### Virtual Reality Support
The [Vivecraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/vivecraft) mod transforms Minecraft into an exceptional VR experience in room-scale or seated play! VR players have access to nearly all the features available to desktop players. Non-VR players are encouraged to use this mod too, so they can accurately see VR players' movements. To join in VR, simply launch Minecraft as usual while in VR with SteamVR running.
### Player & Entity Animations
Animations have been vastly improved for both players and most entities, creating a more dynamic and immersive experience. Players must make a [quick edit](https://github.com/IthanMendoza/Fresh-Moves/wiki) to their skin to enable/fix eye animations.
### Performance Optimization
Utilizing modern performance mods, the NFFC Enhancement Pack delivers a significant FPS boost and smoother performance without sacrificing shader support, advanced texture pack support, zoom, or capes.
